title: fagelia pinnata
intro: Fagelia pinnata, also known as the Dillenia suffruticosa, is a small, deciduous shrub native to tropical regions in Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Fagelia pinnata include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. Fagelia pinnata is typically prepared for herbal use in the form of a decoction, where the leaves and bark are steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
